final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 anniversary celebration e-commerce announcement.

Style/medium: clean commercial poster design, modern tech aesthetic with promotional energy
Composition: vertical poster format, centered hero layout with clear visual hierarchy
Subject: UGREEN NAS private cloud device as hero product, sleek hardware with subtle glow
Scene/backdrop: festive celebration atmosphere with subtle 618 anniversary visual cues, clean gradient or abstract tech background
Lighting/mood: bright and inviting commercial lighting, energetic and trustworthy mood
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as anchor, warm celebration accents (gold/orange), clean white space
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云品牌618周年庆活动电商宣布海报"
Constraints: must work as e-commerce banner/poster, text must be legible at thumbnail size
Avoid: cluttered layout, generic stock photo feel, watermark, 8K stuffer words
